_note: Frozen baseline for eval/golden.demo.jsonl: repo self-indexed, pure hybrid (RAG_RERANK_AUTO=off). The demo indexes this repo itself, so the corpus grows as the repo does; Hit@5 is the stable gated headline (held at 1.0 after the chunker fix that added module-level constant indexing), while Hit@1/MRR drift as files are added. Re-freeze deliberately when a metric moves beyond the +/-5pp gate tolerance. This freeze reflects the post-ADR-0004 corpus (new docs/adr/ and docs/agents/ files were added, shifting infrastructure Hit@1 from 1.0→0.667 as new docs competed with config.py for the 'excluded directories' query). Chunk context prefix ablation: WITH and WITHOUT prefix both produce identical numbers — Stage 1 null result, see docs/adr/0004 and ROADMAP item #2.
